message:
feat(gateway): implement Slack Block Kit and webhook HMAC signatures

Replaces placeholder notification implementations with production-ready
Slack and webhook delivery.

Slack integration (Block Kit):
- buildSlackPayload() generates rich Block Kit message structure
- Header block with priority emoji (🚨 urgent, 🔴 high, 🟡 medium, 🟢 low)
- Body section with mrkdwn formatting
- Context block with category/priority/source metadata
- Action buttons for up to 5 notification actions (danger/primary styles)
- Optional link section with "View details →" CTA

Webhook integration (HMAC):
- Full notification payload with all fields serialized to JSON
- Standard headers: Content-Type, X-Flywheel-Notification-Id, X-Flywheel-Event
- HMAC-SHA256 signature when secret is configured:
  - X-Flywheel-Timestamp: Unix timestamp
  - X-Flywheel-Signature: sha256=<signature>
  - Signature computed over: "{timestamp}.{payloadJson}"
- Proper error handling with status codes and error text logging

Replaces TODO/SIMULATION placeholders with actual HTTP delivery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
